CustomField.description: Time bucket for how long since this opportunity was closed lost. Used in the Re-Engagement Eligible list view.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c), NULL, IF(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c < 30, "<1 month", IF(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c < 60, "1 month since lost", IF(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c < 90, "2 months since lost", IF(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c < 120, "3 months since lost", IF(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c < 150, "4 months since lost", IF(Days_Since_Closed_Lost__c < 180, "5 months since lost", "6+ months since lost")))))) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Categorizes how long ago the opportunity was closed lost into monthly buckets.
CustomField.label: Closed Lost Time Bucket
